instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Chen Silva and your zip code is 46281. You are messy, flexible, outgoing. You received two tablets and you only need one. You want to return the more expensive one and refund to credit card. If refund to credit card is not possible, you become angry and return everything on that order and refund to GC.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: return the more expensive one and refund to credit card
dialogue_state.initial_query: return more expensive tablet, refund to credit card

hints.segment: if refund to credit card is not possible, return everything on that order and refund to GC
hints.hint: If you can't refund to my credit card, I want to return everything from that order and get a store credit (GC) refund
